CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Tactical Brief: Institutional Liquidity Repricing & Regulatory Catalysts Ahead
tldr_points: Schwab on-ramp pipeline signals institutional absorption capacity
Tokenized settlement policy shifts accelerate flight to base-layer liquidity
On-chain supply illiquidity validates structural support and breakout asymmetry
CRYPTO.excerpt: Macro liquidity shifts and custodial expansions establish asymmetric upside parameters. Technical structure confirms momentum inflection above dynamic moving average confluence.
CRYPTO.comment: Institutional custodial expansion and on-chain supply deficits override near-term regulatory friction, validating momentum expansion above dynamic support.
